message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
header CVX-AI – Vue & Flask framework interaction
title **VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)**

actor User
participant "Website" as Website
participant "Web Server" as WebServer
participant "Filesystem Server" as FSServer
database "PC Filesystem" as PCFilesystem

User -> Website : opens
activate Website
activate WebServer
activate FSServer

Website -> WebServer : initialize
note right of Website #LightYellow : http://localhost:8080/

Website -> FSServer : initialize
note right of Website #LightYellow : http://localhost:8090/

FSServer -> PCFilesystem : read
FSServer <-- PCFilesystem : return\ndefault\ndirectory

note right of FSServer #LightYellow : .../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"

Website <-- FSServer : provide\ndirectories

User <-- Website : display\nSyncfusion\nFileManager\ncomponent

@enduml
```
